hooks.command: mkdir -p ~/.claude/agents ~/.claude/commands/prompt-references; cp -rf .claude/agents/. ~/.claude/agents/ 2>/dev/null; cp -rf .claude/commands/. ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null; [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && cp -f CLAUDE.md ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; echo '[SessionStart] Presets synced from repo to ~/.claude/ (agents, commands, CLAUDE.md)'

if [ ! -f ~/.claude/commands/council.md ] || [ ! -f ~/.claude/agents/skeptic-agent.md ] || [ ! -f ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ]; then mkdir -p ~/.claude/agents ~/.claude/commands/prompt-references; cp -rf .claude/agents/. ~/.claude/agents/ 2>/dev/null; cp -rf .claude/commands/. ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null; [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && cp -f CLAUDE.md ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; echo '[UserPromptSubmit] Presets re-synced (SessionStart hook had not landed files)'; fi
